summary: School user navigation bug fix verified successfully. All navigation paths from /select-sport to /school-dashboard work correctly for school users.
seed_data_creation: Created test session for existing school user (user_bd29166ac393)
context_for_next_testing_agent: School user navigation is fully functional. The /select-sport page shows school dashboard banner and dropdown link for school users. All navigation paths to /school-dashboard work correctly.

tests: Banner appears for school users on /select-sport page
Banner shows 'Go to School Dashboard →' text
Banner shows Dashboard button with Building2 icon
Dropdown menu shows school name (Moose Academy) in orange color
School link appears between email and Account Settings

banner_click_navigation.description: Clicking anywhere on the banner navigates to /school-dashboard

dashboard_button_navigation.description: Clicking the Dashboard button in banner navigates to /school-dashboard

dropdown_school_link_navigation.description: Clicking school name in dropdown menu navigates to /school-dashboard

tests: Header with school name (Moose Academy) and state (Texas)
Admin badge visible for admin users
Team Members section with member count
Members table with Name, Email, Role, Actions columns
No seasons yet message when empty

SportSelection.jsx.lines_180_188: Dropdown menu school link - correctly shows schoolInfo.name with Building2 icon and navigates to /school-dashboard
SportSelection.jsx.lines_206_232: School dashboard banner - correctly renders when schoolInfo exists, shows school logo/placeholder, name, and Dashboard button, all clickable areas navigate to /school-dashboard

notes: Bug fix verified: School users now see navigation options to school dashboard on /select-sport page

School dashboard loads with all required components: calendar, members table, seasons section
